title: Dolphin SDK TUs are byte-portable from the CC0 sibling decomp — port, don't hand-write
applies_when: symbol is an OS*/DVD*/GX*/PAD*/VI*/CARD*/AI*/AR*/DSP* SDK function
summary: src/dolphin/* is stock Nintendo Dolphin SDK. Identical source exists in the CC0 sibling GameCube decomps (Pokemon XD / TeamOrre) and the local reference tree tools/symbolmap/xd_ref. The SDK library was built with the same MWCC (GC/1.2.5n class) so a faithful port byte-matches. This is the single highest-yield tactic for this directory (80 files still open).
do: Port the function body verbatim from tools/symbolmap/xd_ref or the CC0 XD/melee-SDK sibling, then diff against target asm.
Keep SDK header layouts and #include order identical to the sibling.
do_not: Do not reverse-engineer SDK functions from asm when a CC0 sibling source exists.
Do not renumber or invent SDK symbol names — the SDK names are known.
